full_text:
Zuo Yi 左奕
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zuo Yi (左奕). Participated in the attack on Bu Chan under Lu Kang’s command. Zuo Yi was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
